plugin.name: showpointer
plugin._long: Draws attention to the mouse pointer with converging rings, a spotlight, a glowing halo and click ripples. Useful for presentations, screencasts and for finding a lost cursor.

option.name: attention
option._long: Sends a burst of rings converging on the pointer.

option.name: toggle_halo
option._long: Turns the persistent glow around the pointer on and off.

option.name: toggle_spotlight
option._long: Dims everything except a circle around the pointer, until pressed again.

option.name: ring_color
option._long: Color of the converging rings.

option.name: ring_radius
option._long: Radius the rings start from, in pixels. They shrink from here down to the pointer.

option.name: ring_width
option._long: Stroke width of a ring at its starting radius, in pixels, including the dark outline on both sides. Rings get thinner as they shrink.

option.name: ring_count
option._long: How many rings are sent per burst. They are staggered in time so they arrive one after another.

option.name: burst_duration
option._long: How long a full burst lasts.

option.name: shake_enabled
option._short: Shake the pointer to trigger a burst
option._long: Sends an attention burst when the pointer is shaken quickly from side to side. Disabled by default because fast normal movement can occasionally look like a shake.

option.name: shake_reversals
option._long: How many horizontal direction changes must happen within the time window to count as a shake.

option.name: shake_distance
option._long: How far the pointer must travel in one direction, in pixels, for a direction change to count.

option.name: shake_timeout
option._long: The direction changes must all happen within this many milliseconds.

option.name: halo_color
option._long: Color of the glow around the pointer.

option.name: halo_radius
option._long: Radius of the glow, in pixels.

option.name: halo_pulse
option._long: How much the halo grows and shrinks while it is on, as a fraction of its radius. 0 gives a steady glow.

option.name: halo_pulse_period
option._long: Duration of one full pulse cycle, in milliseconds.

option.name: toggle_duration
option._long: How long the halo and the spotlight take to fade in and out.

option.name: spotlight_color
option._long: Color and strength of the dimming applied outside the spotlight.

option.name: spotlight_radius
option._long: Radius of the fully undimmed circle around the pointer, in pixels.

option.name: spotlight_feather
option._long: Width of the soft transition between the spotlight and the dimmed area, in pixels.

option.name: ripple_enabled
option._short: Show a ripple on every click
option._long: Expands a ring from the pointer whenever a mouse button is pressed.

option.name: ripple_radius
option._long: Radius the ripple expands to before disappearing, in pixels.

option.name: ripple_width
option._long: Stroke width of the ripple at its full radius, in pixels.

option.name: ripple_color_left
option._long: Ripple color for the left mouse button.

option.name: ripple_color_right
option._long: Ripple color for the right mouse button.

option.name: ripple_color_middle
option._long: Ripple color for the middle mouse button and any other button.

option.name: ripple_duration
option._long: How long a single ripple takes to expand and fade out.
